Redeem Kiwis instantly as cashback into bank account via UPI at a rate of 4 Kiwis = Rs 1
additionalDetails: Co-branded credit card issued in partnership with Kiwi (GoKiwi)
All spends are processed via UPI scan & pay through the Kiwi app, earning 1.5% cashback across all non-excluded categories
Optional 'Kiwi Neon' annual subscription (Rs 999/year) upgrades eligible Kiwi App spends to 2% cashback; above Rs 1.5 lakh yearly spend continues at 2% unless a Neon milestone applies.

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK and Kiwi approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK and Kiwi approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Virtual RuPay credit card issued by YES Bank in partnership with Kiwi (GoKiwi).
Rewards are earned as Kiwis where 4 Kiwis = Rs 1, redeemable directly to bank account via UPI.

All spend categories (online, dining, grocery, travel, base, amazon) are scored at the UPI rate (1.5% cashback) since the card is used exclusively via UPI scan & pay through the Kiwi app — there is no non-UPI swipe mode.
